name: 递归搜索与排序
subject: cs
domain_name: Unit 9-10 继承与递归 Inheritance & Recursion
curriculum_points:
1.15.B.2
String
Develop code to call A object has index values
methods on string objects from 0 to one less than the length
and determine the result of of the string. Attempting to access
calling these methods. indices outside this range will result in a
StringIndexOutOfBoundsException
.
